title: Anneslia fasciculata
taxonomy: Anneslia fasciculata is classified within the family Anneslieae, which is a small group of flowering plants. This classification is part of the larger Apocynaceae family, a diverse group of plants. More specifically, Anneslia fasciculata is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It belongs to the order Gentianales, which includes other flowering plant families such as Apocynaceae and Loganiaceae. Further research may be needed to fully understand the taxonomic classification of Anneslia fasciculata.
